acceptanceReviewed.criterion: CLI parser rejects missing and flag-like values for all value-taking LAN video smoke flags.
Flag-like values fail as typed usage errors before network, sample, or artifact behavior can run.
Usage output remains shared across send and receive entry points.
Scope excludes product QUIC, decode/render/presentation, artifact content, latency, workflow dispatch, credentials, Mac hardware, cross-device validation, and live LAN claims.

realWorldValidation.evidence: CLI parser contract tests use dependency-free Rust argument parsing and do not require sockets, live LAN validation, Mac hardware, product QUIC, decode, render, presentation, latency measurement, workflow dispatch, credentials, or cross-device validation.
